query:
SELECT id, code, title, colorTheme, displayOrder, totalLessons, cpdHours, introVideoUrl
FROM courses 
WHERE code IN ('CHAP101', 'PROP-101')
ORDER BY code
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT id, code, title, colorTheme, displayOrder, totalLessons, cpdHours, introVideoUrl
FROM courses 
WHERE code IN ('CHAP101', 'PROP-101')
ORDER BY code
